title: 3 Stocks With High Forward Rates of Return
text: Donald Yacktman, a well-known value investor and founder of Yacktman Asset Management (Trades, Portfolio), took the forward rate of return into account when he evaluated the attractiveness of a stock. This valuation ratio is calculated as normalized free cash flow yield plus real growth plus inflation.

title: Regions Financial: The Preferred Shares Offer A 6.3% Yield But The Common Shares Offer Potential Capital Gains
text: Regions Financial is a bank focusing on Alabama, Florida, and Tennessee, where it owns a substantial portfolio of commercial loans. The total amount of loans with a non-accrual status is rather low, and the existing loan loss provisions are a multiple of that number.

title: A Trio of Stocks Trading With a Margin of Safety
text: When screening the market for bargains, investors may want to consider the following stocks, since their share prices are trading below the intrinsic value calculated by GuruFocus' free cash flow-based discounted cash flow calculator.
